answer:
\boxed{After the mission is complete, Stevens demands to be disconnected from life support and wants to die naturally, refusing to continue as a comatose patient on neural sensors.}

Initially, he angrily rejects the idea of being kept alive artificially, insisting on his own terms. However, his final act—saving the timeline by making it real—implies he ultimately accepts a different fate, though the film leaves his true outcome ambiguous.
